content: We can design AI agents that organize their long-term episodic experience around functionally specialized attention modules, mirroring how induction heads in large Transformers naturally develop human-like episodic memory traits (temporal contiguity, primacy, recency) without explicit memory architecture programming. This would let AI agents automatically prioritize and retrieve contextually relevant past interactions the same way human episodic memory naturally surfaces salient experiences.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
trigger_topic: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
